queries.question: Could you provide the types of exercise program for all fitness studios?
queries.sql: select fitness_studio.name , exercise_program.type from Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program join Exercise_Program on Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program.ExerciseProgramID = Exercise_Program.ProgramID join Fitness_Studio on Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program.FitnessStudioID = Fitness_Studio.StudioID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?fitness_studio_exercise_program a :Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program .
  ?exercise_program a :Exercise_Program .
  ?fitness_studio_exercise_program p:hasExercise_Program ?exercise_program .
  ?fitness_studio a :Fitness_Studio .
  ?fitness_studio_exercise_program p:hasFitness_Studio ?fitness_studio .
  ?fitness_studio p:name ?name .
  ?exercise_program p:Type ?type .
}

queries.question: What exercise programs are available for each fitness studio?
queries.sql: SELECT Exercise_Program.Type  from Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program join Exercise_Program on Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program.ExerciseProgramID = Exercise_Program.ProgramID join Fitness_Studio on Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program.FitnessStudioID = Fitness_Studio.StudioID   GROUP BY Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program.ExerciseProgramID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Fitness_Studio_Exercise_Program.FitnessStudioID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Fitness_Studio)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What exercise programs are available for each fitness studio?
